name: Optimize Google rankings with Browse AI and ChatGPT 2/2

expect.label: Enter a Spreadsheet ID and Sheet Name

mapper.html:
Hey!

Great news, {{12.`4`}} is ranked no 1 on Google!
You can find the rankings here.
mapper.subject: SEO ranking

messages.content:
You are a SEO pro.

This is your company website: https://www.make.com/en

You are trying to rank number one on Google for the keyword: No code

You are currently ranked number {{12.`1`}}.

Analyze the content on every page of your website and suggest what you should improve to rank number one on Google. Mention what's good regarding the incorporation of the keyword.

The structure of each page's analyses should be:
SEO Strengths on page content
SEO Suggestions for page
Do not include any pretext.
